mapper.select: SELECT u.id, u.nickname, u.avatar, u.signature, u.like_count as likeCount, u.follow_count as followCount, u.fans_count as fansCount FROM follow f LEFT JOIN user u ON f.follow_user_id = u.id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY f.id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT u.id, u.nickname, u.avatar, u.signature, u.like_count as likeCount, u.follow_count as followCount, u.fans_count as fansCount FROM follow f LEFT JOIN user u ON f.user_id = u.id WHERE f.follow_user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY f.id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
